fallback_contact.rationale: Phone 204-257-4242 and ask for the estimating department or owner. Akribia is a framing subcontractor (commercial buildings in Winnipeg, MB and Western Canada). Note that as a framing sub themselves, Akribia is more of a peer/partner than a GC-buyer of painting — they sometimes GC small projects but the strongest angle is partnership: refer painting to them when they need a sub on builds where they're framing.

needs_review_flags: Akribia is primarily a framing subcontractor, not a GC — this may be a partner relationship rather than a bid-list opportunity
Phone 204-257-4242 to introduce and ask who handles their estimating / who they recommend painters work with
